{{Quote|I love the smell of corpses on the battlefield.|Terkuss|<ref name="DFRS" />}}
'''Terkuss''' was a [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Freja Covell]]. He originally resisted being drafted, only acquiescing when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] threatened to raze his [[Homeworld/Legends|home]]. However, Terkuss was a bully at heart, and soon grew to enjoy serving as an Imperial soldier.<ref name="DFRS" /> He was transferred by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Freja Covell|Covell]] to [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]] as part of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] [[Mount Tantiss project]] to serve as a [[Clone template/Legends|genetic template]] for [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] soldiers.<ref name="TTS">''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]''</ref>
